findings.title: DES encryption in ECB mode for data protection
findings.description: Application uses DES in manual ECB mode to encrypt sensitive records

findings.title: Hardcoded DES encryption key
findings.description: DES encryption key hardcoded as plaintext byte slice in source code

findings.title: MD5 used for password hashing
findings.description: User passwords hashed with unsalted MD5 which is cryptographically broken

findings.title: MD5 used for data integrity signatures
findings.description: Integrity signatures computed using MD5 concatenation instead of HMAC

findings.title: Predictable session token generation via weak PRNG
findings.description: Session tokens generated using math/rand seeded with predictable Unix timestamp

findings.title: Predictable API token generation
findings.description: API tokens generated by hashing predictable sequential counter and timestamp values
